title: nouhuysia arfakensis
intro: Nouhuysia arfakensis, also known as the Papuan lemurli tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nouhuysia arfakensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
